body:
This pull request extends the interpolation operators and static column-depth computations at halo-edge locations on a conformal cubed sphere panel. These extensions are required when using the extended grid configuration, in which halo cells are exchanged only once at the beginning of each baroclinic time step to improve performance during barotropic substepping.

With this optimization, edge-based interpolation operators and column-depth evaluations must be computed correctly using the extended halo layout. However, the previous implementation implicitly relied on default interior behavior at panel edges, which leads to incorrect values in this configuration.

This PR fixes the interpolation operators and column-depth computations along halo edges by explicitly handling the cubed sphere panel connectivity. The changes ensure correctness for extended grids while preserving the intended performance benefits of reduced halo exchanges during barotropic substepping.
title: Fix halo-edge interpolation and column depth for extended conformal cubed sphere grids
